hero.title: Safari yako inakusubiri katika Lulu ya Afrika
hero.subtitle: Gundua safari zisizosahaulika, mandhari nzuri na tamaduni hai na Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.

story.label: Explore Africa with
story.title: Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.
story.description: Kutoka milima yenye ukungu hadi mito mikubwa, ipate Uganda kwa namna mpya.
story.p1: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> is a destination management company established in Uganda, specializing in authentic, smooth, and memorable journeys across East Africa. From misty mountains and dense rainforests to serene lakes, mighty rivers, and warm local hospitality, we design travel experiences that feel personal, polished, and deeply connected to place.
story.p2: <0>Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co.</0> offers carefully tailored safaris for families, couples, groups, and private explorers seeking something more meaningful than an ordinary holiday. Our journeys bring together wildlife, culture, conservation, and comfort, creating an elegant way to encounter Uganda in its most beautiful and unforgettable form.

why.label: Safari yako. Uzoefu wetu.
why.title: Kwa nini usafiri nasi?
why.description: Tunatengeneza safari za kukumbukwa zenye utamaduni, mandhari na wanyamapori.

toursPage.description: Safari zilizochaguliwa kwa makini Uganda na Afrika Mashariki.

bookingForm.title: Hifadhi safari hii
bookingForm.subtitle: Tuambie kuhusu safari yako nasi tutakujibu kuhusu upatikanaji na bei.
bookingForm.info: Tutawasiliana nawe kwa barua pepe au WhatsApp.
bookingForm.success: Ombi limetumwa. Tutawasiliana nawe hivi karibuni.
bookingForm.requiredMissing: Tafadhali jaza sehemu muhimu zilizoangaziwa kabla ya kutuma.

inquiryForm.subtitle: Tuambie jinsi tunavyoweza kusaidia na wataalamu wetu watakujibu kwa email au WhatsApp.

footer.about: Sisi ni kampuni ya familia ya wenyeji inayobuni safari za kiikolojia Uganda na Afrika Mashariki.
footer.rights: © 2025 Uganda Family Tours & Safari Co. Haki zote zimehifadhiwa.

welcome.label: Karibu
welcome.title: Karibu!
welcome.p1: Karibu Uganda Family Tours & Safari Company, mshirika wako wa safari salama na rafiki kwa mazingira.
welcome.p2: Timu yetu ya wenyeji husaidia familia kugundua uzuri, wanyamapori na utamaduni wa Uganda.

origins.label: Orodha ya ndoto
origins.title: Asili yetu
origins.p1: Hadithi yetu ilianza kwa upendo wa asili, wanyamapori na watu wa Uganda.
origins.p2: Leo tunatengeneza safari salama, halisi na endelevu kwa familia kutoka duniani kote.

initiatives.label: Wasiliana nasi sasa
initiatives.title: Miradi yetu
initiatives.description: Tunajitolea kwa utalii unaowajibika na manufaa kwa jamii na mazingira.

responsible.title: Utalii unaowajibika
responsible.text: Tunajitolea kwa utalii unaowajibika na manufaa kwa jamii na mazingira.

community.title: Uwezeshaji jamii
community.text: Tunafanya kazi na shule na vikundi vya jamii kuboresha elimu na fursa.

mammadu.title: The Mammadu Trust
mammadu.p1: Tunaunga mkono watoto, wanawake na familia zilizo katika mazingira magumu.
mammadu.p2: Mwongoza safari anaweza kupanga ziara au msaada kwa uwazi na uangalifu.

orange.title: Orange Community Project
orange.p1: Tunafanya kazi na shule na vikundi vya jamii kuboresha elimu na fursa.
orange.p2: Miradi yetu huleta faida endelevu zaidi ya kila safari.
